hard_constraints.description: Barre 57 family must be >= 25% of total weekly classes at any location
Every active studio day must include AM and PM coverage; use midday coverage where demand and qualified trainers support it
Saturday should be a high-load day, without violating weekly floors, trainer caps, or quality gates
Sunday may carry AM and PM coverage when targets require it; no Sunday class should start before 10:00
Specialist classes only certified trainers
Express class must be paired with full-length equivalent on same day
Studio Recovery must never be first class of day
Foundations never at 11:30 or 19:15
No trainer may exceed 4 assigned hours in one day
PowerCycle NEVER at Kenkere House
Strength Lab ONLY at Kwality House
Pre/Post Natal is not auto-scheduled unless manually pinned or saved as a hard custom rule at an eligible location
Peak midday slot must never be empty
Prioritize at least one strong Barre 57 family option in the AM block every active day
Prioritize strong Barre 57 or Cardio Barre coverage in weekday PM demand windows
Prioritize Tier 1 trainers for primary peak slots where qualified and available
Trainer substitution protocol hierarchy
Specialist classes no substitution with non-certified
Do not schedule proven low-performing class/trainer/slot histories unless manually pinned; unsupported formats require explicit custom rules
A trainer cannot be scheduled across 2 locations in the same shift
Same class formats must not be scheduled consecutively
No classes before 07:00, between 13:00-15:00, or after 20:30
Every trainer must have at least 1 weekly off day; 2 is preferred when coverage allows, and no trainer may exceed 2 days without assignments unless unavoidable
Recovery sessions must be the last class in their shift at that location

soft_constraints.description: Mat 57 minimum 3-4x per week per location
Back Body Blaze morning only 07:30-09:00 max 3x/week
Studio Amped Up max 1-2x/week Reshma or Rohan only
Strength Lab max 2x/week Kwality Mon/Wed evenings only
Always fill peak midday 11:00-11:30 and prime evening 19:00-19:30
Fill morning block 08:00-09:30 and early evening 17:45-18:15
Fill early morning 07:00-07:30 and late evening 20:00
